manufacturerInfo.title: magneticManufacturerInfo
manufacturerInfo.description: Manufacturer information for the magnetic. Extends the shared manufacturerInfo with a datasheetInfo block for catalogue-level data.

datasheetInfo.description: All values extracted directly from the component datasheet, organised by domain.

distributorsInfo.description: The lists of distributors of the magnetic

rotation.description: The rotation of the magnetic, by default the winding column goes vertical

magneticDatasheetInfo.description: All values extracted directly from the component datasheet, organised by domain.

part.description: Basic part identification from the datasheet.

electrical.description: Electrical characteristics as stated in the datasheet, one entry per connection configuration. A part with a single configuration has a one-entry array; parts that can be wired several ways (e.g. a multiline suppression bead used as common-mode choke, series inductor, etc.) have one entry per wiring. In each entry the required `subtype` selects the variant, `name` / `numberTurns` describe the configuration, and the remaining fields are the electrical characteristics for that wiring.

thermal.description: Operating temperature range from the datasheet.

mechanical.description: Physical dimensions and mounting style from the datasheet.

application.description: Application parameters published by the manufacturer — describes the circuit this component was designed for, not the component's intrinsic electrical properties.

model.description: Circuit model parameters for SPICE simulation, specialised per magnetic subtype. The required `subtype` field selects the variant. Only the chip-bead model is defined so far; transformer / inductor variants can be added to this oneOf.

description.description: Human-readable product description as given in the datasheet or catalogue.

matchCode.description: Internal match / order code used by the manufacturer.

family.description: Product family or series name (e.g. WE-CMB, WE-CNSW).

caseCode.description: Case or package code / size reference (e.g. '0805', 'SMD-4P').

windingStyle.description: Winding construction style (e.g. bifilar, sectional, trifilar).

material.description: Core material designation as given in the datasheet (e.g. NiZn, MnZn).

numberOfWindings.description: Total number of electrically independent windings.

automotive.description: True if the part is qualified for automotive applications (AEC-Q200 or equivalent).

shielded.description: True if the component has a shielded construction.

insulationGrade.description: Insulation grade classification as stated in the datasheet (e.g. 'reinforced', 'basic'). Aligns with IEC insulationType vocabulary.

magneticDatasheetImpedancePoint.title: DatasheetImpedancePoint
magneticDatasheetImpedancePoint.description: Impedance vs. frequency point from the datasheet, optionally parameterised by DC bias current. The magnitude goes in impedance.magnitude; phase / real / imaginary parts are optional.

impedance.description: Impedance value. Uses the same impedancePoint structure as designRequirements.

current.description: DC bias current in Amperes at which this point was measured (chip beads / DC-biased parts).

winding.description: Winding / array element this point applies to (e.g. element of a bead array). Omit for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetResistancePoint.title: DatasheetResistancePoint
magneticDatasheetResistancePoint.description: Resistance vs. frequency point from the datasheet, optionally parameterised by DC bias current.

current.description: DC bias current in Amperes at which this point was measured.

winding.description: Winding / array element this point applies to (e.g. element of a bead array). Omit for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetReactancePoint.title: DatasheetReactancePoint
magneticDatasheetReactancePoint.description: Reactance vs. frequency point from the datasheet, optionally parameterised by DC bias current.

current.description: DC bias current in Amperes at which this point was measured.

winding.description: Winding / array element this point applies to (e.g. element of a bead array). Omit for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetPulsePoint.title: DatasheetPulsePoint
magneticDatasheetPulsePoint.description: Maximum pulse current vs. pulse length point from the datasheet.

winding.description: Winding / array element this point applies to (e.g. element of a bead array). Omit for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetNumberPulsesPoint.title: DatasheetNumberPulsesPoint
magneticDatasheetNumberPulsesPoint.description: Number of pulses vs. maximum pulse current point from the datasheet.

winding.description: Winding / array element this point applies to (e.g. element of a bead array). Omit for single-winding parts.

magneticDatasheetInductorElectrical.title: MagneticDatasheetInductorElectrical
magneticDatasheetInductorElectrical.description: Datasheet electrical characteristics of a single-winding inductor.

name.description: Label of this connection configuration as given in the datasheet (e.g. '4 x current compensated', '4 turns'). Omit for a part with a single configuration.

numberTurns.description: Effective number of turns for this connection configuration.

dcResistance.description: DC resistance in Ohms. nominal = typical value, maximum = datasheet max.

ratedCurrents.description: Rated DC current, as a single-entry array.

saturationCurrentPeak.description: Peak saturation current in Amperes (I_sat from datasheet).

impedancePoints.description: Impedance vs. frequency points (RF / high-frequency inductors).

maximumImpedance.description: Peak / maximum impedance magnitude in Ohms.

magneticDatasheetCoupledInductorElectric.title: MagneticDatasheetCoupledInductorElectrical
magneticDatasheetCoupledInductorElectric.description: Datasheet electrical characteristics of a multi-winding coupled inductor.

name.description: Label of this connection configuration as given in the datasheet (e.g. '4 x current compensated', '4 turns'). Omit for a part with a single configuration.

numberTurns.description: Effective number of turns for this connection configuration.

inductance.description: Inductance per winding in Henries, with tolerance.

ratedCurrents.description: Rated DC current per winding (one entry per winding; a single-entry array for a single rated value).

saturationCurrentPeak.description: Peak saturation current in Amperes (I_sat from datasheet).

turnsRatios.description: Turns ratios between the primary and each other winding (primary turns / winding turns), one entry per secondary. Uses the same array-of-dimensionWithTolerance shape as designRequirements.turnsRatios.

magneticDatasheetTransformerElectrical.title: MagneticDatasheetTransformerElectrical
magneticDatasheetTransformerElectrical.description: Datasheet electrical characteristics of a transformer.

name.description: Label of this connection configuration as given in the datasheet (e.g. '4 x current compensated', '4 turns'). Omit for a part with a single configuration.

numberTurns.description: Effective number of turns for this connection configuration.

inductance.description: Magnetizing inductance in Henries, with tolerance.

ratedCurrents.description: Rated DC current per winding (one entry per winding; a single-entry array for a single rated value).

ratedVoltageDC.description: Maximum rated DC voltage between any two terminals in Volts.

ratedVoltageAC.description: Maximum rated AC voltage (RMS) between windings in Volts.

insulationTestVoltageAC.description: Hi-pot / dielectric withstand test voltage (AC RMS) in Volts.

insulationResistance.description: Minimum insulation resistance between windings in Ohms.

turnsRatios.description: Turns ratios between the primary and each other winding (primary turns / winding turns), one entry per secondary. Uses the same array-of-dimensionWithTolerance shape as designRequirements.turnsRatios.

magneticDatasheetCommonModeChokeElectric.title: MagneticDatasheetCommonModeChokeElectrical
magneticDatasheetCommonModeChokeElectric.description: Datasheet electrical characteristics of a common-mode choke.

name.description: Label of this connection configuration as given in the datasheet (e.g. '4 x current compensated', '4 turns'). Omit for a part with a single configuration.

numberTurns.description: Effective number of turns for this connection configuration.

ratedCurrents.description: Rated DC current per line (one entry per line; a single-entry array for a single rated value).

ratedVoltageDC.description: Maximum rated DC voltage between any two terminals in Volts.

ratedVoltageAC.description: Maximum rated AC voltage (RMS) between windings in Volts.

insulationTestVoltageAC.description: Hi-pot / dielectric withstand test voltage (AC RMS) in Volts.

insulationResistance.description: Minimum insulation resistance between windings in Ohms.

inductance.description: Rated common-mode inductance in Henries (the per-line inductance presented to common-mode current). Datasheet-specified for common-mode chokes; distinct from leakageInductance (the differential-mode term).

commonModeFilter.description: Common-mode filter performance figures from the datasheet.

magneticDatasheetChipBeadElectrical.title: MagneticDatasheetChipBeadElectrical
magneticDatasheetChipBeadElectrical.description: Datasheet electrical characteristics of a chip bead (ferrite bead).

name.description: Label of this connection configuration as given in the datasheet (e.g. '4 x current compensated', '4 turns'). Omit for a part with a single configuration.

numberTurns.description: Effective number of turns for this connection configuration.

dcResistance.description: DC resistance in Ohms. nominal = typical value, maximum = datasheet max.

ratedCurrents.description: Rated DC current per element (one entry per element of a bead array; a single-entry array for a single bead).

impedancePoints.description: Impedance vs. frequency points, optionally parameterised by DC bias current.

resistancePoints.description: Resistance vs. frequency points, optionally parameterised by DC bias current.

reactancePoints.description: Reactance vs. frequency points, optionally parameterised by DC bias current.

pulsePoints.description: Maximum pulse current vs. pulse length points.

numberPulsesPoints.description: Number of pulses vs. maximum pulse current points.

impedanceTolerance.description: Tolerance on the impedance values, expressed as a percentage (e.g. 20 means +/-20%).

magneticDatasheetApplication.title: MagneticDatasheetApplication
magneticDatasheetApplication.description: Application parameters published by the manufacturer in the datasheet. These describe the circuit the component was designed for, not the component's intrinsic electrical properties.

switchingFrequency.description: Nominal switching frequency in Hz for which this component is designed.

inputVoltage.description: Input voltage range for which this component is designed, in Volts.

outputVoltages.description: Output voltages per secondary winding in Volts.

outputCurrents.description: Output currents per secondary winding in Amperes.

cutOffFrequency.description: -3 dB cut-off frequency of the common-mode filter in Hz.

attenuation.description: Common-mode insertion-loss / attenuation value from the datasheet in dB.

attenuationTestCondition.description: Test condition string for the attenuation figure (e.g. '100 MHz, 50 Ω').

temperatureRise.description: Maximum temperature rise above ambient. Unit: K (numerically equivalent to a Celsius difference).

thermalResistance.description: Thermal resistance. Unit: K/W (numerically equivalent to °C/W).

diameter.description: Body diameter in metres (for cylindrical parts).

mounting.description: PCB mounting style. Uses the same connectionType enum as designRequirements.terminalType.

magneticDatasheetChipBeadModel.title: MagneticDatasheetChipBeadModel
magneticDatasheetChipBeadModel.description: Circuit model parameters for SPICE simulation of chip beads (series R in series with a parallel R-L-C).
